query:
SELECT asi.*, a.loja_id, a.created_at as analise_data, l.nome as loja_nome
FROM analises_stock_items asi
JOIN analises_stock a ON asi.analise_id = a.id
JOIN lojas l ON a.loja_id = l.id
WHERE asi.eurocode LIKE '%6569BYPV%'
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC;
